messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

import { Suspense } from "react"; import FilterBar from "@/components/FilterBar"; import SortBar from "@/components/SortBar"; import CampaignList from "@/components/CampaignList"; import ListSkeleton from "@/components/ListSkeleton"; import { Search, Sparkles, Zap, ShieldCheck } from "lucide-react"; export default function Home({ searchParams }: { searchParams: any }) { return (
{/* --- Premium Animated Hero Section --- */}
{/* Background Blobs */}
Premium Campaign Engine

Discover Premium
Influencer Ops.

Aggregation hub for Korea's leading 7 review platforms. Filter through thousands of verified campaigns with 60fps responsiveness.

{/* Elite Search Interface */}
{/* Decorative Glow */}
{/* Trust Indicators */}
Real-time Sync
Verified Sources
{/* --- Content Area with Glass Navigation --- */}

Active Campaigns

}>
{/* Footer Style Anchor */}

© 2025 ReviewEverything · Premium Aggregator

); }

source:
"use client" export default function ScraperStatusTable({ initialRuns }: { initialRuns: any[] }) { if (initialRuns.length === 0) return (
크롤링 실행 이력이 없습니다.
) return (
{initialRuns.map((run, idx) => ( ))}
배치 ID 타겟 플랫폼 실행 상태 저장된 레코드 에러 트리거 (Log) 시작 일시
#{run.id} {run.platform?.name || "Unknown"} {run.status === 'RUNNING' ? '수집중...' : run.status} {run.records_added > 0 ? `+${run.records_added}건` : '-'} {run.error_log || "특이사항 없음"} {new Date(run.start_time).toLocaleString()}
) }
